ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Panpour: pale blue-grey water-type monkey with rounded water-tuft matches sm3-36 record and Bulbapedia Elemental monkeys article.

trivia_bullets.text: Panpour represents 'see no evil' in the trio's three-wise-monkeys conceit; sprite depicts closed or averted eyes. All three share identical base stats, similar moves, and parallel cries.

"The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail." The tuft is a water reservoir and a gardening tool — elemental utility mirroring Pansear's roasting and Pansage's herb-growing.
Burning Shadows (SM3), released August 5, 2017. Panpour is a low-rarity Water-type common; the set is otherwise known for Darkness-themed legendaries.
In Black and White, a Panpour was gifted to players who chose Tepig as their starter (water counters fire). The trio was designed as an early-game type-coverage distribution system.

related_cards.name: Pansear
related_cards.note: Fire-arm of the trio, same set
